_note: Synoptic parallel passages. When multiple gospels record the same event or saying, our renderings should harmonize (same saying → same Thai wording) where the Greek matches, and diverge where the Greek diverges. Curated from standard Synopsis of the Four Gospels.
_format: Each entry: an array of passage groups. Each group lists parallel refs.

groups.name: Healing man with unclean spirit at Capernaum
